name: rOt 2
short_description: Minimal puzzle game which goal is to get The Ball to the WinBox using the Circles in the scenes. Old and new obstacles, and the return of One Chance Mode.
detailed_description:
Second game of the franchise.
Minimal puzzle game which goal is to get The Ball to the WinBox using the Circles in the scenes. New obstacles introduced every 10 levels.

- Old and New obstacles!
- Steam Achievements
- HD Resolution
- 30 Levels
- Simple Interface
- 'One Chance' mode: You have only one chance. If you fail, it's over.

Controls: Arrows and Spacebar


Inspired by the amazing game qop
Music by: OpenGameArt user hectavex

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Bulgarian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Danish, Finnish, Greek, Dutch, Hungarian, Japanese, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil, Romanian, Russian, Swedish, Thai, Czech, Turkish, Ukrainian, Arabic
*languages with full audio support
